name: infa-data-provisioning-mcp-server
title: Informatica Data Provisioning MCP Server
summary: Informatica (A Salesforce company) Automates the provisioning and management of enterprise data assets leveraging Cloud Data Marketplace (CDMP)
description: Informatica (A Salesforce company) Automates the provisioning and management of enterprise data assets leveraging Cloud Data Marketplace (CDMP).

useCases.name: Just-in-Time Data Access
useCases.description: Allows users to ask queries like, 'Get me access to the Q3 Sales dataset,' and the agent initiates the request immediately.

useCases.name: Compliance-First Sourcing
useCases.description: Ensures that sensitive data is only provisioned after the proper approvals and justifications are recorded.

useCases.name: Self-Service Analytics
useCases.description: Empowers business users to obtain the data they need for their BI tools without opening manual IT tickets.

useCases.name: Automated Onboarding
useCases.description: Automatically requests access to necessary data bundles for new team members based on their roles.

idmcOauthDataProvisioning.description: Authenticate with Informatica OAuth2 authorization server using the client credentials flow.
